markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into Assort Health's product, pitch, and sales process.](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Core Pitch:** Assort Health’s pitch reframes the value proposition from a simple AI call handler to a comprehensive system that navigates the full complexity of patient access, including insurance rules and specialty-specific protocols.](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
  - [**Key Differentiator:** The "Assort Synapse" engine is the core technical advantage, building bespoke AI agents by ingesting unstructured data (EHRs, runbooks) to handle complex, specialty-specific workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
  - [**Buyer Justification:** The primary business justification for buyers is labor reduction, which directly addresses the "vicious cycle" of rising costs and flat reimbursements.](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=2724.0)
  - [**Sales & Onboarding Friction:** The main sales objections are price and competitor contract structures (e.g., month-to-month). Onboarding friction stems from a lack of explicit executive alignment post-sale.](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=2911.0)

## Topics

### Market Challenge: The "Vicious Cycle"

  - [The pitch begins by framing the market challenge as a "vicious cycle" for healthcare providers:](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
      - [Rising costs (labor, supplies) vs. flat reimbursements → Pressure to optimize with fewer staff.](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
      - [This leads to patient dissatisfaction and operational strain.](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [The pitch is tailored to specific specialties (e.g., orthopedics, gastro) to resonate with buyers who "think they're special snowflakes."](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)

### Solution: Handling Real-World Complexity

  - [Assort Health's value is in handling the real-world complexity of patient access, which goes far beyond a simple AI call.](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Key Variables:**](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
      - [**Patient:** Condition, insurance, communication preferences (e.g., language, digital literacy).](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
      - [**Practice:** Specific scheduling templates, visit history, and care team structures.](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
      - [**Insurance:** Complex rules like global periods, which dictate billing eligibility and care team assignments (e.g., MD vs. PA).](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)

### Differentiator: The "Assort Synapse" Engine

  - [The core technical advantage is the "Assort Synapse" engine, which builds bespoke AI agents by ingesting unstructured data.](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
  - [**Data Sources:**](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
      - [**EHR:** Scheduling templates, visit history, and non-obvious provider patterns.](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
      - [**VoIP System:** Call recordings and line structures.](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
      - [**Runbooks:** Specialty-specific "bibles" or "cheat sheets" containing protocols for eligibility, prior auths, and prep instructions.](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
  - [This process allows for a bespoke agent build that handles complex workflows, which is the "reason to believe" that validates the product's claims.](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)

### Demo & Product Overview

  - [The demo has two parts:](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)
      - [**Voice Demo:** A live call simulation showcasing natural language processing and complex workflow navigation (e.g., confirming insurance, finding a provider).](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=1876.0)
      - [**Backend Dashboard:** A leadership view for tracking performance (resolution rates, transfers) and a detailed call log for accountability.](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=2091.0)
  - [**New Intake Product:** A feature for managing patient check-in journeys, including form collection and automated outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=2429.0)
  - [**Competitive Landscape:**](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=2580.0)
      - [Competes with voice AI vendors (e.g., Relatient, Luma, Transform9), not traditional VoIP providers (e.g., RingCentral).](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=2580.0)
      - [Key advantage: A 3-month implementation period vs. competitors' 1-year free trials, enabling faster ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=2635.0)

### Sales & Onboarding Dynamics

  - [**ICP:** Provider groups from 8 providers to 4,000 providers (MSOs).](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [**Lead Sources:** Events, outbound, and customer referrals.](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=2842.0)
  - [**Sales Team:** 6 BDRs (5 in seat) and 8 AEs (6 active).](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=2875.0)
  - [**Common Objections:**](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=2911.0)
      - [**Price:** Handled with ROI calculators and case studies.](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=2911.0)
      - [**Contract Structure:** Competitors offer month-to-month. Assort Health counters by framing these as unproven products and emphasizing its own track record.](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=2911.0)
  - [**Onboarding Friction:**](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=3003.0)
      - [Post-sales team needs better objection handling and framing skills.](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=3003.0)
      - [Lacks explicit executive alignment post-sale, which can cause issues if stakeholders later scrutinize call transcripts.](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=3003.0)

### Messaging Guidance

  - [**Use:** "Patient access," "patient engagement," "voice AI," "call center AI."](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=3171.0)
  - [**Avoid:** "Agentic AI." The ICP is more familiar with "AI agents."](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [**Key Asset:** An EHR matrix document detailing compatible systems is critical for sales and could be a future content asset.](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=3115.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kathy Lam:** Request the following documents from Brooke and Christine Frasic:](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=2820.0)
      - [Labor reduction ROI data.](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=2724.0)
      - [EHR matrix.](https://fathom.video/share/kox_4b7pAEP9uKxViJmLc4WHucJRgd4U?tab=summary&timestamp=3115.0)
